<!-- EB5-SCAFFOLD v1 | generated by eb5-prepare | structural guidance only — contains NO investor financial figures or PII | safe-to-read -->

# EB-5 Document Checklist — {{PROJECT_LABEL}}

Status: `[ ]` not started · `[~]` partial · `[x]` complete & filed · `[n/a]` not applicable.
This checklist is **tailored to the source-of-funds path(s) you selected**; sections for
paths you didn't select have been removed. Add items your attorney specifically requests.

> Put **documents** in the matching numbered folder, not in this file. This file tracks
> *status only* — keep dollar amounts, account numbers, and PII out of it.

## A. Identity & personal  → `01_Identity_and_Personal/`

- [ ] Valid passport (bio page) for the investor
- [ ] Passport-style photographs per current USCIS spec
- [ ] Passports / IDs for each dependent included in the petition (spouse, children < 21)
- [ ] Birth certificate(s) — investor and each dependent (certified translation if not English)
- [ ] Marriage certificate / divorce decree, if applicable (certified translation if needed)
- [ ] Prior/current US immigration status documents, if any (visas, I-94, EAD, prior petitions)
- [ ] Resume/CV (helps establish capacity to have earned the funds)

## B. Source of funds (lawful origin)  → `02_Source_of_Funds/`

- [ ] **Source-of-Funds narrative** completed from `02_Source_of_Funds/SOF_Narrative_TEMPLATE.md`
- [ ] Evidence set assembled for **each** selected path below
- [ ] Certified English translations for every non-English financial document

<!-- SOF:salary START -->
### B1. Salary / employment income & accumulated savings
- [ ] Employment verification letter(s) stating position, tenure, and compensation
- [ ] Pay records covering the relevant earning period
- [ ] Tax returns / official tax statements for the relevant years
- [ ] Bank/savings statements showing accumulation of the funds over time
- [ ] Explanation connecting accumulated savings to the invested amount (in the narrative)
<!-- SOF:salary END -->

<!-- SOF:property START -->
### B2. Sale of property / real estate
- [ ] Proof of ownership before sale (deed/title)
- [ ] Sale agreement / closing statement
- [ ] Proof of receipt of sale proceeds into your account
- [ ] Evidence of how you originally acquired/paid for the property (the "source of the source")
- [ ] Tax document for the sale, if applicable
<!-- SOF:property END -->

<!-- SOF:business START -->
### B3. Business income / sale of a business / dividends
- [ ] Business registration / incorporation documents and ownership evidence
- [ ] Audited or official financial statements for the relevant period
- [ ] Dividend/distribution records or sale agreement (if the business was sold)
- [ ] Business tax filings
- [ ] Evidence the distributed funds reached your personal account
<!-- SOF:business END -->

<!-- SOF:gift START -->
### B4. Gift
- [ ] Signed gift declaration/affidavit from the donor (relationship, amount, no-repayment)
- [ ] Evidence of the **donor's** lawful source of the gifted funds (the gift is only as
      clean as its origin — USCIS traces this)
- [ ] Proof of transfer of the gift to you
- [ ] Tax treatment of the gift, if applicable in the relevant jurisdiction
<!-- SOF:gift END -->

<!-- SOF:inheritance START -->
### B5. Inheritance
- [ ] Death certificate of the decedent
- [ ] Will / probate / succession documents
- [ ] Evidence linking the inherited assets to the decedent's lawful holdings
- [ ] Proof the inherited funds reached your account
<!-- SOF:inheritance END -->

<!-- SOF:loan START -->
### B6. Loan (e.g., secured by your own assets)
- [ ] Loan agreement with terms
- [ ] Evidence of the collateral and that **you** own it (EB-5 loan proceeds generally must
      be secured by the investor's own assets)
- [ ] Proof of disbursement of the loan proceeds to you
- [ ] Lender's documentation / regulatory standing, as applicable
<!-- SOF:loan END -->

<!-- SOF:investment START -->
### B7. Investment / securities proceeds
- [ ] Brokerage/account statements showing the holdings and their sale
- [ ] Evidence of the funds originally used to buy the investments (source of the source)
- [ ] Capital-gains / tax documentation, if applicable
- [ ] Proof proceeds reached the account used for the EB-5 investment
<!-- SOF:investment END -->

<!-- SOF:rsu START -->
### B8. Restricted stock units (RSUs) / equity compensation
- [ ] Employer RSU grant / award agreement(s) establishing the equity compensation
- [ ] Vesting schedule and vesting confirmations for the units that funded the investment
- [ ] Pay records / employer statements showing the vested RSU value reported as income
- [ ] Brokerage statements showing the vested shares and their sale
- [ ] Tax documentation for both the RSU income at vesting and any capital gain on sale
- [ ] Evidence the sale proceeds reached the account used for the EB-5 investment
- [ ] Source of the source: proof of the employment that granted the RSUs (ties to the salary
      evidence set if you also selected that path)
<!-- SOF:rsu END -->

## C. Path of funds (the transfer trail)  → `03_Path_of_Funds/`

- [ ] **Path-of-Funds flow** completed from `03_Path_of_Funds/Path_of_Funds_TEMPLATE.md`
- [ ] A document evidencing **every hop** in the chain (account → … → escrow/NCE)
- [ ] Explanation of any intermediary (currency conversion, third-party transfer, exchange house)
- [ ] Foreign-exchange / remittance approvals, if your jurisdiction requires them

## D. Investment documents (from the issuer / regional center)  → `04_Investment_Documents/`

- [ ] Private Placement Memorandum (PPM)
- [ ] Subscription agreement
- [ ] Limited partnership / operating agreement (NCE governing docs)
- [ ] Escrow agreement
- [ ] Evidence of investment / capital contribution into the NCE
- [ ] Project's I-956F approval (or filing receipt if pending)
- [ ] Business plan & economic (job-creation) report, if provided

## E. Immigration forms & exhibits  → `05_Immigration_Forms/`

- [ ] I-526E form, prepared/reviewed by your attorney
- [ ] Exhibit index mapping each claim to its supporting document
- [ ] G-28 (attorney representation), if applicable
<!-- STAGE:i829 START -->
- [ ] I-829 (removal of conditions) — when eligible
- [ ] Evidence the required jobs were created / will be created within the allowed period
- [ ] Evidence capital remained at risk and sustained for the required period
<!-- STAGE:i829 END -->

## F. Independent project due diligence  → `06_Project_Due_Diligence/`

- [ ] Independent verification of the regional center's good standing (USCIS list)
- [ ] Independent verification of the project's I-956F status
- [ ] Saved due-diligence report (run `/eb5-vet "<project/RC name>"` and save the HTML here)
- [ ] Your own questions for the issuer/attorney 1:1 (from the due-diligence report)

## G. Correspondence  → `99_Correspondence_Log/`

- [ ] Attorney Q&A / RFE log started (`Attorney_QA_Log.md`)
- [ ] Every outstanding attorney request has an entry with a status

---

> Organizational guidance only, **not legal advice**. Your attorney's document request list
> for your specific case governs.
